i built an optimization layer that drops into existing inference providers systems and automatically reduces their costs to run by 60% or allows them to process 3X the requests with no performance degradation.

**Key Findings:**
- CAAE achieves **45ms P99 TTFT** vs. 300-400ms for alternatives
- **8.9x improvement** over vLLM-LRU baseline
- **6.7x improvement** over TensorRT-LLM
- Consistent low-latency performance across all percentiles

**Key Findings:**
- CAAE maintains **25ms P99 ITL** with lowest standard deviation
- **3x improvement** over vLLM-LRU
- **2.2x improvement** over TensorRT-LLM
- Most consistent performance (lowest std dev)

**Key Findings:**
- CAAE delivers **445ms P99 end-to-end latency**
- **2.8x improvement** over vLLM-LRU
- **1.7x improvement** over TensorRT-LLM
- Enables real-time conversational AI applications

## Benchmark Methodology

### Test Environment
- **Hardware:** 8x NVIDIA H100 80GB GPUs
- **Model:** Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1
- **Framework:** vLLM 0.2.7 + CAAE plugin
- **Workload:** Mixed chat (70%) and RAG (30%) requests
- **Duration:** 1-hour sustained load test
- **Metrics Collection:** 60-second intervals
